meaning: 新义州[朝鲜民主主义人民共和国西北部城市]
examples: When the train arrived in Sinuiju Station, as usual it took a few hours of inspection.
On the return train from Pyongyang to Sinuiju, there were only my wife and I in the sleeper compartment, so I closed the door, took out my camera, and started taking pictures.
It is about 50 kilometers (31 miles) south of Sinuiju, the North Korean city at the country's busiest border crossing with China.
On the east side is the North Korean city of Sinuiju.
